title: Korak 20

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    password = ''
    # Generate password
    for _ in range(length):
        password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
    return password
challengeFiles.seed:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    password = ''
    # Generate password
    for _ in range(length):
        password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
    return password

tests.text: Treba ti da pozoveš generate_password kada prolaziš kroz 8 kao argument.
Trebalo bi da postaviš vrednost generate_password(8) za parametar new_password.

description: Konačno, deklarišite parametar new_password i postavite mu vrednost na rezultat poziva generate_password. Proširite 8 kao argument u vaš poziv generate_password.
